title: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Shiva temple situated in Kandiyoor near Mavelikkara on the banks of Achankovil river.
overview.description: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Shiva temple situated in Kandiyoor near Mavelikkara on the banks of Achankovil river. Kandiyoor was once the capital of the Odanadu kingdom. The temple and region are related to the history of ancient Buddhism in Kerala. Mattom Sree Mahadeva Temple also known as shiva nada is 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) west of Mavelikkara town north of State Highway 6.

Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Karazhma
topPlaces.description: Karazhma is a small village in the Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. Karazma is located in the Chennithala Punchayat and is the site of Karazhma Bhagvati Temple.

topPlaces.name: Valiyaperumpuzha
topPlaces.description: Valiyaperumpuzha is a village situated in Mavelikkara, on the banks of the Achankovil river, in between Mavelikkara Municipality, Chennithala Panchayat, and Chettikulangara Panchayat in Kerala, India. Valiyaperumpuzha is situated 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) north of Thattarambalanm Junction.

topPlaces.name: Chennithala
topPlaces.description: Chennithala is a census town in Mavelikkara taluk of Alappuzha district, Kerala state, India. This village consists mainly of paddy fields and coconut groves.

topPlaces.name: Mavelikara Maruthakshi Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Mavelikara Maruthakshi Devi Temple is a Hindu temple in Mavelikkara, Kerala, in India.

topPlaces.name: Thazhakkara
topPlaces.description: Thazhakkara is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Thazhakkara is one among the five Villages in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha District.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Mavelikara
topPlaces.description: The Eparchy of Mavelikara is a Syro-Malankara Catholic Church ecclesiastical territory or Eparchy of the Catholic Church in India. It is a suffragan eparchy in the ecclesiastical province of the metropolitan Archeparchy of Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: Mavelikkara
topPlaces.description: Mavelikkara (IPA: [ma:ʋe:lik:aɾa]) is a municipality in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. Mavelikara is situated approximately 43 km south of Alappuzha, the district headquarters, and about 119 km north of Thiruvananthapuram, the state capital.

topPlaces.name: Kallumala
topPlaces.description: Kallumala is a village near Mavelikara railway station in Mavelikara taluk. Kallumala is the twenty-first ward of Thazhakkara Grama Panchayat, Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

items.note: Karazhma is a small village in the Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. Karazma is located in the Chennithala Punchayat and is the site of Karazhma Bhagvati Temple.

Valiyaperumpuzha is a village situated in Mavelikkara, on the banks of the Achankovil river, in between Mavelikkara Municipality, Chennithala Panchayat, and Chettikulangara Panchayat in Kerala, India. Valiyaperumpuzha is situated 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) north of Thattarambalanm Junction.
Chennithala is a census town in Mavelikkara taluk of Alappuzha district, Kerala state, India. This village consists mainly of paddy fields and coconut groves.

Thazhakkara is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Thazhakkara is one among the five Villages in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha District.

The Eparchy of Mavelikara is a Syro-Malankara Catholic Church ecclesiastical territory or Eparchy of the Catholic Church in India. It is a suffragan eparchy in the ecclesiastical province of the metropolitan Archeparchy of Trivandrum.

Mavelikkara (IPA: [ma:ʋe:lik:aɾa]) is a municipality in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. Mavelikara is situated approximately 43 km south of Alappuzha, the district headquarters, and about 119 km north of Thiruvananthapuram, the state capital.
Kallumala is a village near Mavelikara railway station in Mavelikara taluk. Kallumala is the twenty-first ward of Thazhakkara Grama Panchayat, Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karazhma, Valiyaperumpuzha, Chennithala, Mavelikara Maruthakshi Devi Temple, Thazhakkara.
